parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const body = { chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.telegram_message }; if ($json.parse_mode) body.parse_mode = $json.parse_mode; if ($json.reply_markup) body.reply_markup = $json.reply_markup; if ($json.source_message_id && $json.source_kind !== 'CALLBACK_QUERY') body.reply_parameters = { message_id: Number($json.source_message_id) || $json.source_message_id }; return body; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const body = { chat_id: $json.chat_id, message_id: Number($json.callback_message_id) || $json.callback_message_id, text: $json.telegram_message }; if ($json.parse_mode) body.parse_mode = $json.parse_mode; if ($json.reply_markup) body.reply_markup = $json.reply_markup; return body; })() }}
